title: Supreme Court hears TMC plea against exclusion of State employees from vote count supervisor duty: LIVE UPDATES
description: The Supreme Court is hearing a plea by the Trinamool Congress Party (TMC) challenging the Chief Electoral Officer's decision to deploy only Central government employees as vote-counting supervisors for the assembly elections in West Bengal.A Bench of Justices PS Narasimha and Joymalya Bagchi is hearing the matter. The plea was listed on an urgent basis since the vote count is scheduled for May 4, Monday. The plea has been filed against an order of the Calcutta High Court, whi
